test-code.description: when with typed subject and 2 branches is ok -- typed subject is idiomatic for exhaustive matching
when with 3 WhenEntry nodes (two cases plus else) is ok - no violation
when with 3 branches is ok - no violation
when without subject and 3 branches is ok - no violation
condition-only when (no subject) with 2 branches is a violation -- use if/else instead
multi-value when branch groups many enum cases into one -- no violation
multi-value single branch covers all cases at threshold -- no violation
